missions.name: Archive Relay Repair
missions.description: Restore an Institute relay carrying encrypted continuity records between Ceres vaults.

missions.name: Quarantine Satellite Service
missions.description: Service a quarantine satellite that watches outbound biological cargo for trace containment failures.

missions.name: Specimen Telescope Alignment
missions.description: Align the Institute telescope used to screen faint thermal signatures from long-duration specimen canisters.

missions.name: Vault Relay Swap
missions.description: Replace relay hardware that keeps Porter's offsite vault telemetry synchronized with the Ceres clinic.
